GENERATE_CONTENT_API="generateContent"
POST /v1/projects/${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT}/locations/${GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION}/publishers/google/models/${MODEL_ID}:${GENERATE_CONTENT_API}
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/google/models/gemini-embedding-2:embedContent
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/google/models/MODEL_VERSION:predict
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/google/models/MODEL_ID:predictLongRunning
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/google/models/lyria-002:predict
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/anthropic/models/MODEL:rawPredict
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/publishers/anthropic/models/MODEL:streamRawPredict
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/global/endpoints/openapi/responses
POST /v1beta1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/endpoints/openapi/chat/completions
POST /v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/endpoints/openapi/chat/completions
{"model": "zai-org/glm-test-maas"}
